title: Nimitz Library :: USNA
description: The Library Home page for the https://www.usna.edu/Library Site on the USNA Website. This page was last updated on Wed Feb 25 12:24:42 EST 2026.
text:
Library resources off the yard
Need access to library databases and other resources while you’re away on break? This guide will show you how to do it.
Research refresher guide
Need a refresher on academic research? Check out our guide - it covers finding books, scholarly articles, primary sources, and more!
Reduced library hours
The library will be closed weekends and evenings while the Brigade is on spring break. Detailed hours here.
